creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 3/30/2013 6:51 AM, Bryan Drewery wrote:
> This does work. Note that the vulnerability-test-date has a dynamic
> version depending on INSTALLATION_DATE. You submitted this PR on Jan 17.
> The port you have installed is "2013.01.07".
> 
> The vuln spec specifies that it is not vuln!
> 
>> vulnerability-test-port>=2000<2013.01.17|http://cvsweb.freebsd.org/ports/security/vulnerability-test-port/|Not vulnerable, just a test port (database: 2013-01-17)
> 
> Note that '<2013.01.07'
> 

I typo'd and meant 2013.01.17 in both places. Still the same assessment
though.

-- 
Regards,
Bryan Drewery
bdrewery@freenode/EFNet
